name: Apple TV+
tagline: Selective prestige releases with occasional Telugu theatrical pickups.
intro: Apple TV+ is a comparatively small but increasingly visible window for Indian cinema, including occasional Telugu theatrical releases that the platform has acquired as part of its broader international content strategy. Unlike Netflix or Prime Video, Apple TV+ curates tightly rather than building a broad catalogue, and its Telugu slate is therefore sparse but often high-profile. For viewers who already subscribe for Apple's original English-language programming, the platform's occasional Telugu pickups are a bonus rather than a primary reason to subscribe. Our directory tracks every Telugu film or series with a confirmed Apple TV+ window, drawn from official announcements and the platform's public listings in India. Each entry has a dedicated detail page so you can quickly check the streaming date, type, and any additional metadata we have indexed for the title.
